title: AAIB Investigates Runway Undershoot Incident in British Virgin Islands

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The UK Air Accidents Investigation Branch (AAIB) has launched an investigation into an incident involving a Short Bros SD3-60 aircraft, registered as N915GD. The occurrence was reported on 6 November 2024, at Terrance B. Lettsome International Airport, located in the British Virgin Islands.

The inquiry will examine the circumstances surrounding the runway undershoot to determine contributing factors and improve safety measures. This investigation underscores the importance of aviation safety standards, a concern that resonates strongly in Scotland, where HIAL airports connect communities across the Highlands and Islands.

sourceReferences.citationText: aaib-bulletins – AAIB investigation to Short Bros SD3-60, N915GD
